articles.title: Nisbah Capital joins Tezos blockchain baker ecosystem
articles.description: Nisbah Capital, the blockchain subsidiary of Saudi Arabia-based Taibah Valley, announced it will join the Tezos ecosystem as a corporate baker, the first in the Middle East region. It also has added the Tezos blockchain to its blockchain lab projects as part of its initiative to create the biggest blockchain community in the MENA region […] CryptoNinjas » Nisbah Capital joins Tezos...

articles.title: 199,999,980 XRP Sent to Coinbase As Bitcoin Traders Move Massive Amounts of BTC
articles.description: A heap of XRP is heading to Coinbase as Bitcoin traders rotate nearly half a billion dollars worth of BTC. According to the on-chain crypto tracker Whale Alert, a large XRP holder just sent $199,999,980 XRP from an unknown wallet to crypto exchange Coinbase. According to Bithomp, the whale originally received the nearly $200 million […]

articles.title: Stellar (XLM) Leapfrogs into the top 10 on CMC, Edging out Chainlink
articles.description: Quick take: Stellar (XLM) is now ranked 9th on Coinmarketcap with Chainlink in the 10th position Stellar (XLM) initially fell to $0.11 after news broke of the SEC suing Ripple The digital asset has since set a two-year high of $0.418 due to news of Ukraine using the Stellar network to issue its own digital currency Altcoins have been in the green this week with Stellar (XLM) leading the pack into...

articles.title: Coronavirus Vaccinations Certified With VeChain’s Blockchain Tech in Cyprus
articles.description: The medical certification app was developed by VeChain and I-Dante last May.

articles.title: XRP Soars Above $0.31, Surpassing Litecoin (LTC)
articles.description: XRP has reached a two-week high, rallying together with the rest of the cryptocurrency market

articles.title: YouTube star Mr Beast, with 50M subscribers,  becomes a verified Brave browser publisher
articles.description: Mr Beast, joins almost 1 million other verified Brave publishers, potentially exposing some of his subscribers to Brave browser and its native BAT token.

articles.title: Cardano’s market cap flips Bitcoin Cash (BCH) after ADA rallies by 100%
articles.description: In the past week, Cardano price surged by more than 100% and overtook Bitcoin Cash to become the sixth-largest cryptocurrency.
